x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: HR Performance Analytics indicators provide the trend data Now Assist uses for predictive HR insights and workforce analytics. Without PA data, Now Assist HRSD cannot provide trend-based AI recommendations.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Create Performance Analytics indicators for key HR metrics (case volume by category, resolution time, employee satisfaction) via pa_indicators_list.do. Target: 3+ active HR indicators. PA data enables Now Assist HRSD trend-based AI insights.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_83f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c6a
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[HR Performance Analytics indicators provide the trend data Now Assist uses for predictive HR insights and workforce analytics. Without PA data, Now Assist HRSD cannot provide trend-based AI recommendations.]]></ai_justification><check_name>HR Analytics and Reporting</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var matched = {};

    function collectMatches(keyword) {
        var gr = new GlideRecord('pa_indicators');
        gr.addQuery('active', true);
        gr.addQuery('name', 'CONTAINS', keyword);
        gr.query();
        while (gr.next()) {
            matched[gr.getUniqueValue()] = true;
        }
    }

    collectMatches('HR');
    collectMatches('human resources');
    collectMatches('Human Resources');

    var count = Object.keys(matched).length;
    var actualValue = count + ' active HR Performance Analytics indicators';

    if (count >= 3) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' active HR PA indicators. Now Assist HRSD can provide trend-based AI insights for HR service delivery.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active HR PA indicator(s) (target: 3+). Now Assist HRSD trend-based insights will be limited — point-in-time analysis only for uncovered metrics.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No active HR PA indicators found. Now Assist HRSD uses PA trend data for predictive HR insights — without it AI defaults to point-in-time analysis only.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>HRSD</module><number>CHK0000407</number><order>150</order><remediation_guidance>Create Performance Analytics indicators for key HR metrics (case volume by category, resolution time, employee satisfaction) via pa_indicators_list.do. Target: 3+ active HR indicators. PA data enables Now Assist HRSD trend-based AI insights.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>83f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c6a</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>HR Analytics and Reporting</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_83f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c6a</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
